occurrence_sentence: Research from Yale University, newly published in Annals of Physics, has established that we can unify the ways in which we describe measurements in classical physics and quantum physics.

Research from [Yale University](https://physics.yale.edu/), newly published in [Annals of Physics](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0003491620300233?via%3Dihub), has established that we can unify the ways in which we describe measurements in classical physics and quantum physics.
